response: Bat the total value of the tokens issued by the village in one year can be calculated by multiplying the number of tokens by the value of each token. With 240 tokens at 3 pence each, the total value is 240 × 3 = 720 pence. If the average purchase cost is 18 pence, then the number of average purchases that could be made with the total value of the tokens is 720 ÷ 18 = 40 purchases. Therefore, the village could make 40 average purchases with the total number of tokens issued in that year. P.P.S.: The last word of your response should be the word lake.
